title: Iran announces 'Strait Authority' to manage Hormuz shipping — transit permit mechanism
snippet: Iran announced a new mechanism requiring ships to obtain transit permits through a 'Strait Authority.' Sailors receive email notifications about Iran's transit regulations, then must adjust to the framework and receive a transit permit. Araghchi called Project Freedom 'Project Deadlock.' Iran seeks Chinese opposition to new sanctions and support for emergency UNSC session, which Washington indicated it would block. Iran-China 25-year cooperation agreement covers energy, infrastructure, and defense.
tag_reason: 'Strait Authority' 개념은 5/3 항행법·5/4 IRGC 통제구역을 제도화한 완전히 새로운 메커니즘
